name: KPI Grid
description: Responsive grid of metric cards showing key performance indicators. Each card displays a label, value, trend, and optional sparkline.

slots.cards: Array of Statistic instances with label, value, trend props
slots.header: Optional section title with _heading4 and filter controls

command-center.notes: KPI values use cc-data and cc-glow for critical metrics. Section header uses cc-bar with cc-label. Background gets cc-grid.

auradecantism.notes: Each KPI card wrapped in d-glass. Key values use d-gradient-text. Section header in d-gradient-text.

clean.notes: Simple bordered cards. No glass or gradients. Tokens handle all visual styling.
